pr.title: Correct comment on sine/cosine approx functions
pr.author: CelestialAmber

summary: Corrected documentation in src/melee/lb/lbvector.c for the local sine/cosine approximation helpers near lbvector_AngleXY. The previous comment called them Taylor series approximations; the PR clarifies that they are best quintic approximations over the range (-pi, pi), derivable via the Gram-Schmidt procedure, and links a supporting reference.
what_changed: Replaced the comment `Taylor series approximations of sin and cos` with a more accurate explanation of the sine/cosine approximation functions.
Documented that the functions are best quintic approximations for the x range (-pi, pi).
Added a note that the approximations can be derived using the Gram-Schmidt procedure, with a Berkeley math notes URL as reference.
No code behavior changed; the diff only adjusted comments.
smart_moves: Corrected misleading mathematical documentation without touching matching-sensitive code.
Preserved the local static function names and implementation while improving context for future readers.
Added derivation context and a reference link, making the approximation choice easier to verify later.
decomp_lessons: When documenting decompiled math helpers, avoid assuming common derivations like Taylor series purely from polynomial shape.
Polynomial approximations in game code may be minimax-like or projection-derived best approximations rather than Taylor expansions.
Comment-only corrections can still matter in decompilation because incorrect explanatory comments may mislead future naming, cleanup, or equivalence reasoning.
If a function is already matched or behaviorally stable, prefer correcting comments over restructuring code unless there is evidence requiring a code change.
naming_conventions: No new symbols or naming convention changes were introduced.
The existing local static helper names `sin` and `cos` were left unchanged in `lbvector.c`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No assembly or matching tactic was changed.
The PR is useful as a caution that mathematical comments should be validated against coefficients/approximation theory rather than inferred from surface resemblance to Taylor series.
follow_up_queries: Find other comments describing polynomial approximations as Taylor series and verify the derivation.
Search lbvector.c for local static math helpers with comments that may affect future decomp naming or cleanup.
Check whether repository spelling uses Gram-Schmidt or Gran-Schmidt in comments and whether consistency matters.
